title: trifolium bullatum
intro: Trifolium bullatum, also known as the lesser burnet, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the legume family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Trifolium bullatum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
